mapper.select: SELECT CONTRACT_NUM , DVC_OFW_AMNT , INST_ORGIN_AMNT , INST_MNTH_CNT , ENGG_MNTH_CNT , MODEL_NAME , MODEL_ID FROM ( SELECT CONTRACT_NUM , DVC_OFW_AMNT , INST_ORGIN_AMNT , INST_MNTH_CNT , ENGG_MNTH_CNT , MODEL_NAME , MODEL_ID , ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY EVNT_TRTM_DT DESC) AS RNUM FROM MSP_JUO_ADD_INFO WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = #{svcCntrNo} AND APP_END_DATE > TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') ) WHERE RNUM = 1
